title: About
text: Confiteor is Latin for “I confess.” This site serves as an encouragement to read and engage with the texts that we might ‘confess.’

title: About
text: Confiteor is Latin for “I confess.” This site serves as an encouragement to read and engage with the texts that we might ‘confess.’

title: About
text:
Content
There are several projects under consideration, including the curation of daily readings from confessions and a daily devotional feed.

title: Confiteor - I confess
text:
I hope that this inspires you to read and learn about the numerous different confessional texts found in the Christian traditions.
This website is a work in progress.
